issues.title: HTTP: add retry with exponential backoff for 429 / 5xx

tests.scope: After the Retry adapter is mounted on the session, a normal GET against SANDBOX still completes successfully — verifies the adapter doesn't break the happy path.
passCriteria: response.data is a non-empty dict (live JSON parsed by _safe_response_body)
client._session.adapters['https://'] is the HTTPAdapter we mounted (not the default)

unmappable.reason: Internal session-config invariant; verified by unit tests asserting on client._session.adapters[...]. No SANDBOX-observable behavior.
Internal Retry-instance config; verified by unit tests. SANDBOX cannot reveal these values.

unmappable.ac: AC-3: max_retries / backoff_factor kwargs override defaults
unmappable.reason: Constructor-kwarg semantics; verified by unit tests asserting on the mounted Retry config.

unmappable.ac: AC-4: pre-built retry kwarg wins over other kwargs
unmappable.reason: Constructor-kwarg precedence; verified by unit tests.
